asset_name: Survodutide Product, Identity and Regulatory Source Closure
status: SOURCE CLOSED WITHIN DEFINED SCOPE / LIVING EVIDENCE ACTIVE
evidence_type: Product, substance identity and current regulatory evidence
evidence_grade: A1 — current official regulator, registry or product source
controlled_conclusion: Survodutide remains an investigational glucagon/GLP-1 receptor dual agonist. SYNCHRONIZE-1 completed in February 2026 and phase 3 obesity results were published in June 2026. The cardiovascular-outcome study reached primary completion in May 2026, but no catalogue SUR10 vial inherits sponsor trial-material identity or approval.
transfer_prohibited: Transfer from authorised, sponsor or trial product to catalogue supplier material
Creation of personal dosing, injection or reconstitution guidance
Assumption of supplier purity, potency, sterility, stability or equivalence
Representation of orphan designation or trial registration as marketing authorisation
next_review_trigger: Material approval, label, trial-result, safety, warning, recall, manufacturer, quality, anti-doping or supplier-evidence change
